refsynopsisdiv.title: Calling Sequence
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [ v , maxcol , lastq , count , recipd ] = lowdisc_sobolstart ( dim_num )

listitem.para: a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers, the current number of dimensions. We expect to have 1<= dim_num<= 40, since no more that 40 polynomials are stored in the database.

a dimmax x logmax matrix of floating point integers, table of direction numbers. We have dimmax = 40 and logmax = 30. Each row corresponds to a primitive polynomial. The numbers in v are actually binary fractions.
a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers, number of bits in atmost
a dim_num x 1 matrix of floating point integers, the numerators of the last vector generated
a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers, the index of the element in the sequence

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the initial data for use in a Sobol sequence.
In the algorithm, the variable atmost is the maximum number of calls to the generator. We have atmost = 2^logmax - 1 with logmax = 30. This leads to atmost = 1.074 x 10^9.
This routine is designed to be used with the lowdisc_sobolnext() and lowdisc_sobolskip() functions.
